$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for CAO agent/terminal status semantics. Unifies web StatusBadge.STATUS_CONFIG (UPPERCASE keys, Tailwind classes) and cao_mcp_apps AgentStatus (lowercase keys, host-CSS-variable classes). Each status maps to one label, one semanticRole (resolved to a color token in color.role), and a pulse flag. Order is significant: it is the canonical render/sort order. Run `node design-tokens/gen.mjs` to regenerate consumers.
